_comment: Sample NON-PHI foundation jobs. Every data ref is typed open:/synthetic:/model: — never a vault path. These are the kinds of work the hive does: serve open models, build education/synthetic datasets, run evals. Post one with: odc.py post-job --kind <kind> --model <model> --data <ref> --desc <text>

jobs.desc: serve the plain-language helper (no diagnosis; organization + education only)
generate synthetic foot-care Q&A from open clinical guidelines
score the open helper against an open knowledge benchmark
aggregate public CDC diabetes statistics for a research brief
